nodes.name: Naruto Uzumaki
nodes.bio: A hyperactive ninja who hosts the Nine-Tails Fox, driven by his dream to become Hokage and earn recognition.

nodes.name: Sasuke Uchiha
nodes.bio: A gifted ninja consumed by revenge against his brother, whose path constantly mirrors Naruto's own journey.

nodes.name: Itachi Uchiha
nodes.bio: A prodigy who massacred his own clan to protect the village, carrying a terrible secret beneath a villainous facade.

nodes.name: Kakashi Hatake
nodes.bio: The Copy Ninja, a genius with a sharingan eye transplanted from his fallen comrade, mentoring Team 7 with hidden grief.

nodes.name: Monkey D. Luffy
nodes.bio: A rubber-powered pirate captain with an unshakable dream of becoming King of the Pirates.

nodes.name: Roronoa Zoro
nodes.bio: A three-sword-style swordsman sworn to become the world's greatest, loyal only to his captain.

nodes.name: Nami
nodes.bio: A brilliant navigator whose obsession with maps and money hides the trauma of losing her village to pirates.

nodes.name: Nico Robin
nodes.bio: An archaeologist who survived the annihilation of her island and spent decades running before finding a crew worth dying for.

nodes.name: Eren Yeager
nodes.bio: A soldier who can transform into a Titan. His desire for freedom eventually drives him toward an apocalyptic plan.

nodes.name: Levi Ackerman
nodes.bio: Humanity's strongest soldier, ruthless in battle but fiercely protective of those under his command.

nodes.name: Mikasa Ackerman
nodes.bio: A prodigiously skilled soldier whose entire world revolves around protecting Eren at any cost.

nodes.name: Armin Arlert
nodes.bio: A strategist with limited physical strength but the mind of a commander, whose plans turn the tide of impossible battles.

nodes.name: Light Yagami
nodes.bio: A genius student who acquires a notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it, declaring himself god of a new world.

nodes.name: L Lawliet
nodes.bio: The world's greatest detective, eccentric and unpredictable, Light's sole intellectual equal.

nodes.name: Near
nodes.bio: L's child successor, coldly analytical and deliberate, who pieces together Kira's identity through patience rather than intuition.

nodes.name: Misa Amane
nodes.bio: A pop idol who wields a second Death Note and worships Light as her savior, blinding herself to the danger he poses.

nodes.name: Edward Elric
nodes.bio: A young alchemist who sacrificed his limbs attempting to resurrect his mother, now searching for the Philosopher's Stone.

nodes.name: Alphonse Elric
nodes.bio: Edward's brother whose soul is bound to a suit of armor, gentle in nature but formidable in battle.

nodes.name: Roy Mustang
nodes.bio: The Flame Alchemist, ambitious and calculating, whose ultimate goal is to become Führer and fix the corrupt state.

nodes.name: Riza Hawkeye
nodes.bio: A sharpshooter and Mustang's most trusted aide, whose quiet loyalty masks a past entangled with alchemy's darkest secrets.

nodes.name: Gon Freecss
nodes.bio: An optimistic boy with extraordinary potential, hunting for his absent father while pushing the limits of what a Hunter can achieve.

nodes.name: Killua Zoldyck
nodes.bio: Born into a family of assassins, Killua befriends Gon and gradually breaks free from his brutal upbringing.

nodes.name: Hisoka
nodes.bio: A sadistic magician who craves only strong opponents worth fighting, viewing people purely as toys to be harvested at peak ripeness.

nodes.name: Kurapika
nodes.bio: The last survivor of the Kurta clan, driven by cold vengeance against the Phantom Troupe who murdered his people.

nodes.name: Tanjiro Kamado
nodes.bio: A kind-hearted boy who becomes a Demon Slayer after his family is massacred, driven by empathy even toward the demons he must destroy.

nodes.name: Nezuko Kamado
nodes.bio: Tanjiro's sister, turned into a demon yet retaining her humanity, fighting alongside her brother against her own nature.

nodes.name: Zenitsu Agatsuma
nodes.bio: A cowardly swordsman who unleashes his full terrifying power only when unconscious, hiding extraordinary skill behind endless panic.

nodes.name: Inosuke Hashibira
nodes.bio: A wild boar-masked brawler raised by animals, whose ferocity and unorthodox combat style complement Tanjiro's precision.

nodes.name: Itadori Yuji
nodes.bio: A physically gifted teenager who becomes the vessel for the King of Curses, sentenced to death but determined to save lives first.

nodes.name: Megumi Fushiguro
nodes.bio: A stoic sorcerer whose shikigami technique grows stronger through strategic thinking, driven by a personal code of who deserves saving.

nodes.name: Nobara Kugisaki
nodes.bio: A fearless first-year sorcerer from the countryside who fights cursed spirits with a hammer and nails without flinching.

nodes.name: Gojo Satoru
nodes.bio: The strongest jujutsu sorcerer alive, whose Infinity technique makes him practically untouchable, masking deep care for his students behind arrogance.

nodes.name: Spike Spiegel
nodes.bio: A bounty hunter drifting through space with a haunted past, a deceptively calm demeanor, and lethal Jeet Kune Do skills.

nodes.name: Faye Valentine
nodes.bio: A con artist with no memory of her past, compensating for her vulnerability with bravado and hidden longing for belonging.

nodes.name: Jet Black
nodes.bio: A former ISSP detective turned bounty hunter whose mechanical arm and moral code anchor the chaotic Bebop crew.

nodes.name: Okabe Rintarou
nodes.bio: A self-proclaimed mad scientist who accidentally invents time travel and must relive tragedy to save the people he loves.

nodes.name: Makise Kurisu
nodes.bio: A neuroscience prodigy whose death sets the time-travel tragedy in motion, sharp-tongued but quietly compassionate.

nodes.name: Mayuri Shiina
nodes.bio: Okabe's childhood friend whose repeated deaths across timelines become the emotional anchor of his desperate loop.

nodes.name: Daru
nodes.bio: The lab's super hacker whose technical genius makes the Phone Microwave possible, providing levity in the darkest moments.

nodes.name: Ichigo Kurosaki
nodes.bio: A teenager who inherits Soul Reaper powers and must defend the living world while uncovering the truth about his heritage.

nodes.name: Rukia Kuchiki
nodes.bio: A Soul Reaper who transfers her powers to Ichigo, whose quiet courage and sense of duty define the series' emotional core.

nodes.name: Renji Abarai
nodes.bio: A hot-headed Soul Reaper lieutenant who grows from rival to ally, driven by loyalty to Rukia above all else.

nodes.name: Izuku Midoriya
nodes.bio: A quirkless boy who inherits the greatest power and must prove himself worthy through sheer will and analytical genius.

nodes.name: Katsuki Bakugo
nodes.bio: Midoriya's explosive rival, whose abrasive exterior hides one of the most relentless drives to be number one.

nodes.name: All Might
nodes.bio: The world's greatest hero who chose Midoriya as his successor, hiding a withering body behind an indestructible smile.

nodes.name: Shoto Todoroki
nodes.bio: A dual-quirk prodigy whose refusal to use his fire half is an act of defiance against the father who weaponized him.

nodes.name: Subaru Natsuki
nodes.bio: An ordinary teen transported to a fantasy world with one terrifying ability: he revives after death, forced to relive trauma endlessly.

nodes.name: Emilia
nodes.bio: A half-elf royal candidate whose resemblance to the Witch of Envy makes her feared, while her genuine goodness disarms those who know her.

nodes.name: Rem
nodes.bio: A demon maid who transforms from cold suspicion to absolute devotion toward Subaru, whose steadfast love defines her arc.

nodes.name: Lelouch vi Britannia
nodes.bio: A deposed prince who acquires the power of absolute command and uses it to topple an empire, sacrificing everything including himself.

nodes.name: C.C.
nodes.bio: An immortal witch who grants Lelouch his Geass, herself searching for someone willing to truly understand and release her from immortality.

nodes.name: Suzaku Kururugi
nodes.bio: Lelouch's best friend and greatest enemy, a Japanese soldier who believes in changing the empire from within.

nodes.name: Denji
nodes.bio: A boy who merges with his devil dog and becomes Chainsaw Man, pursuing simple dreams of food and human connection in a world that uses him.

nodes.name: Makima
nodes.bio: A Public Safety devil hunter whose calm control over everything around her conceals the most dangerous devil of all.

nodes.name: Power
nodes.bio: A Blood Fiend who manipulates blood and acts on pure selfish impulse, forming a surprisingly genuine bond with Denji.

nodes.name: Thorfinn
nodes.bio: A viking boy who swears vengeance for his father's death, spending years as a weapon before discovering what strength truly means.

nodes.name: Askeladd
nodes.bio: A cunning mercenary leader with Welsh blood and Celtic dreams, who shapes Thorfinn by being simultaneously mentor and tormentor.

nodes.name: Canute
nodes.bio: A sheltered prince who transforms into a ruthlessly pragmatic king, convinced that love for humanity requires becoming its master.

nodes.name: Shinji Ikari
nodes.bio: A teenager coerced into piloting a giant mech to save humanity, paralysed by self-loathing and desperate for approval he never receives.

nodes.name: Rei Ayanami
nodes.bio: An enigmatic pilot whose blank affect and mysterious origin make her humanity's most unsettling question mark.

nodes.name: Asuka Langley
nodes.bio: A prodigy pilot whose fierce pride is a brittle shell around a child who was never allowed to be one.

nodes.name: Guts
nodes.bio: A lone swordsman born from a corpse, forged in violence, who carries wounds no armor can cover while chasing the man who destroyed his world.

nodes.name: Griffith
nodes.bio: A transcendent mercenary captain whose ambition ascends him to godhood at the cost of everyone who ever loved him.

nodes.name: Casca
nodes.bio: The Hawks' finest warrior, whose strength and trauma become the moral compass that judges both Guts and Griffith.
